market: Polymarket Seoul/Incheon Jun 18 highest temperature 29C BUY_NO
sizing_rationale: Tiny paper-only hedge because the market prices 29C as the heavy favorite while RKSI current/TAF evidence still centers the day around 28C.
thesis: RKSI was 28C at the 03:30 UTC METAR and the active TAF lists TX28/1806Z for Jun 18. If the airport does not print 29C later in the day, the No side is underpriced at 35c.
invalidation_risks: RKSI prints 29C at any point later today, whole-degree Wunderground settlement rounds an edge print into 29C, clear weather and light wind permit late warming, public Polymarket quote depth is stale or thin.

market: Polymarket Shanghai/ZSPD Jun 19 highest temperature 29C YES
sizing_rationale: Tiny paper-only position because the quote is materially below station-specific fair value, but the market is young and target-bucket liquidity is thin.
thesis: ZSPD's active TAF lists TX29/1906Z, while Met Office Shanghai shows Friday max 28C with heavy rain and showers. The market is centered hotter at 30C/31C, so 29C is underweighted if Pudong remains rain-cooled.
invalidation_risks: Heavy rain caps the station at 28C or lower, clearer breaks lift ZSPD to 30C or above, TAF maximum-temperature guidance updates, Wunderground station history differs from aviation guidance, public Polymarket quote depth is stale or thin.
